title: Resolved task context (pick-task + branch linkage)
description: Written by `.cursor/tools/save-task-context`. Contains one resolved Jira task plus optional Git/Jira branch alignment from checkout-jira-branch --dry-run-json.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema file for editors.

resolved_at.description: When this file was last written (ISO 8601).

generated_by.description: Tool that produced this document (e.g. save-task-context).

task.description: Same shape as a single object from pick-task stdout (see task_to_json_shape).

is_deployed.description: Optional deployment hint (tooling-specific). Null/absent means unknown.

branch_alignment.description: Output of checkout-jira-branch --dry-run-json for the same Jira key, or null if skipped/failed.

git_dirty_hint.description: True if git status --porcelain had output at save time.
